    P

    path - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Enemy
     
    path - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.LevelGenerator.AbstractLevel
     
    paused - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    PauseRequest - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
    this class is used to send a request to the server to pause the game
    PauseRequest() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.PauseRequest
     
    Pistol - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.weaponInstances
    Pistol represents a specific weapon type, inheriting common behavior from the Weapon class.
    Pistol() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.weaponInstances.Pistol
     
    PISTOL_AMMO - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.BulletType
     
    player - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    Player - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    The Player class represents a controllable player entity in the game.
    Player(double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Player
    Constructs a new Player entity at the specified position with defined dimensions.
    playerLost - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Enemy
     
    players - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    Players - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Team
     
    playSound(String) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.SoundManager
    Plays any .wav sound
    PREPARE_FOR_ATTACK - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.EntityStates
     
    pressedKeys - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.UserInputHandler
     
    pressedMouseButtons - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.UserInputHandler
     
    printMap(ArrayList<ArrayList<LevelGenerator.ChunkToPlace>>, List<LevelGenerator.ChunkToPlace>) - Static method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.LevelGenerator
    prints the map of chunks to the console
    Projectile - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons
    The Projectile class represents any projectile in the game that affects entities and environment through collisions.
    Projectile(double, double, double, double, String, boolean, boolean, boolean, ArrayList<Class<?>>) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Projectile
    Constructs a new Projectile with the provided parameters.
